name.description: Display name of the attribute type (e.g. `JavaScript`, `Leadership`, `Years of experience`). Unique among active, same-draft-status attribute types on the same job.

job_id.description: Id of the job this attribute type belongs to. Each job carries its own set of attribute types — there is no org-wide attribute dictionary.

sort_order.description: Display priority within the job's attribute list. Lower values sort first.

active.description: `true` when the attribute type is in use; `false` after it has been archived from the job's attribute list. Defaults to `true`.

is_draft.description: `true` while the attribute is being authored on a draft job and has not yet been published; `false` or `null` once the attribute is part of the live job.

description: Schema for the 'candidate_attribute_types' stream, linked to the '/v3/candidate_attribute_types' endpoint.
